steps.prompt: Search arxiv for last 7 days: 'LLM agents', 'coding agents', 'tool use', 'agentic AI'. Search Exa using web_search_advanced_exa with type='deep' and additionalQueries for each topic cluster (generates parallel sub-searches for better recall). Target Anthropic blog posts, Simon Willison, Trail of Bits, Kapoor/Narayanan. Save papers to corpus. Write findings to .claude/plans/research-sweep.md with source citations.

Read .claude/plans/research-sweep.md. For each finding: does it change our hooks, skills, routing, or architecture? If yes, write a proposal to .claude/plans/research-sweep-proposals.md. Commit to agent-infra with [research-sweep] prefix.
